name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrAccumDedctExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT P.SRC_SYS_CD, P.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, P.YR_NO, P.DEDCT_VRBL_CD, P.DEDCT_VRBL_SEQ_NO, P.DEDCT_LMT_NTWK_CD, P.DRUG_ACCUM_IN, P.ACCUM_AMT, P.MBR_DEDCT_AMT, P.ACCUM_NO, P.DEDCT_VRBL_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.DataMartRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, P.PROD_ACCUM_ID, P.CAROVR_AMT, P.COB_OOP_AMT, P.MBR_DEDCT_CAROVR_AMT, CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), P.PLN_YR_EFF_DT, 23) + ' 00:00:00.000' AS DATETIME) AS PLN_YR_EFF_DT, CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), P.PLN_YR_END_DT, 23) + ' 00:00:00.000' AS DATETIME) AS PLN_YR_END_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_MBR_ACCUM_DEDCT P WHERE P.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} ) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, YR_NO, DEDCT_VRBL_CD, DEDCT_VRBL_SEQ_NO, DEDCT_LMT_NTWK_CD, DRUG_ACCUM_IN, ACCUM_AMT, MBR_DEDCT_AMT, ACCUM_NO, DEDCT_VRBL_DESC, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, PROD_ACCUM_ID, CAROVR_AMT, COB_OOP_AMT, MBR_DEDCT_CAROVR_AMT, PLN_YR_EFF_DT, PLN_YR_END_DT FROM cte

Annotations:
Write MBRSH_DM_MBR_ACCUM_DEDCT Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsDmProdDmDedctCmpntLoad.
Read all the Data from IDS P_ACCUM_DEDCT Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO
Job Name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrAccumDedctExtr
Null Handling and defaults
